titleStmt.title: SII 40.198: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 198. (A.R. No. B. 163 of 1932.) Nāragallu, Chittoor Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of a shrine in the Rāmasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1764 (expired), Kali 4943, Śubhakṛit, Chitra (Chittirai) month, 26th day.

Refers to the regime of Lakshmīdēvi-Ammāḷ, the daughter of Raṅga-Kṛishṇa Muddu-Vīrappa-Nāyaka of Tanjore, and the wife of Kumāra-Veṅkaṭappa-Nāyaka, who was son of Veṅgama-Nāyaka and the grandson of Anantappa Nāyaka, the chief of Nāraganḍapāḷem under her direction, her brother Kannamma Nāyaka who was her agent (muktyār) built the temple of Paṭṭābhirāmasvāmi at Nārgallu and made gift of land for providing services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmajayaṁ
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bbulu 1764 kaliyugābdāḥ 4943 prabhavādi gatābdāḥ
75 Agunēṭi śūbhakṛtu nāma saṁvatsaramaṁddu nāragaṁṭṭapā
ḷeṁ prabhuvulayina mahārājarājaśrī Anaṁtappanā
yanivāri kumārulayina veṁggamanāyani putrulayi
na kumāra veṁkkaṭappanāyanivāri bhāryagārainā mahārā
ja śrī taṁjāvūru Aṭṭāru veṁkkaṭasāmi nāyani vā
ri saptakumārulalōpeddakumārulayina raṁgakṛṣṇa muddu
vīrappanāyani vāri kumā¨rte . Ayina lakṣmīdēvammagāri dora
tanamulōni daripāḷeṁ moktyārudārulayina mānahu
darulayina taṁjāvūru Allūru kanmamanāyanivāriki vu
ttaravu yiccināragaṁṭci śrī paṭṭābhirāmasvāmivāriki dēva
ḷaṁnu tanamugā ga¨rbhagṛhaṁ rātimaṁṭapaṁ madde satraṁ vagairā
kaṭṭiṁcci dharmaṁ naḍipiṁccamani plava saṁvatsara citranela 26 tēdi śē
lavu Ayināru .
Digital edition of SII 40.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
